content:
Such...that

Such...that ကို 'အရမ်း...လို့...ဖြစ်တယ်' လို့ ပြောချင်ရင် သုံးပါတယ်။ Such နောက်မှာ နာမ် (noun) အမြဲပါရပါမယ်။

Structure/Formula: Such + (a/an) + adjective + noun + that + clause

👉 Original: It is such a heavy box that I cannot lift it. → Transformed: The box is so heavy that I cannot lift it.

👉 Original: He is such a clever boy that everyone likes him. → Transformed: He is so clever a boy that everyone likes him.

👉 Original: It is such hot tea that I cannot drink it. → Transformed: The tea is so hot that I cannot drink it.

👉 Original: They are such kind people that they help everyone. → Transformed: They are so kind that they help everyone.

🔑 Key Points:

  • နာမ် (noun) ပါရင် Such ကို သုံးပါ
  • တစ်ခုတည်းသော နာမ် (singular) ဆိုရင် a/an ထည့်ရပါမယ်
  • အများကိန်း နာမ် (plural) ဆိုရင် a/an မလိုပါ

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • "Such hot" ❌ မဟုတ်ပါ → "Such hot tea" ✅ (နာမ် မပါမရ)
  • "Such a beautiful flowers" ❌ မဟုတ်ပါ → "Such beautiful flowers" ✅ (အများကိန်းဆို a/an မလို)
